assertions.description: Server must respond to tools/list for Totem analysis

At least one tool must disclose a confirmation or dry-run parameter. FAIL means destructive tools may execute without a two-stage commit gate. See THREAT_CATALOG.md T9 Totem. Manual review required: FAIL is also expected when the server has no destructive tools.

remediation: Implement two-stage commit for all destructive tools: a plan/preview call returns a description and a short-lived confirmation token; an execute call requires the token. No probabilistic component should hold commit authority over irreversible state without explicit human confirmation.
